seo.title: Veterinary Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your vet clinic. Route upset pet owners to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Veterinary Clinics
hero.subheading: Pet owners are emotional and busy. ReviewFlo helps you ask for feedback without putting clinical details in the spotlight.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Veterinary Clinic Faces

items.heading: Grief and fear show up as one-star rants
items.body: Hard outcomes become public reviews written in the heat of the moment.

items.heading: Happy wellness visits rarely get written up
items.body: Routine care feels unremarkable to clients even when your team did great work.

items.heading: Front desk staff cannot debrief every checkout
items.body: The lobby is loud and the next patient is waiting.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Vet Clinics

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after the visit, not during stress
items.body: Send a link when things are calmer, focused on care and communication.

items.heading: Private outlet before public damage
items.body: Give upset owners a path to your team first.

items.heading: Built for small practices
items.body: No enterprise sales process. Start with manual sends.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: How do we ask without sharing medical details?
items.a: Keep requests about the visit experience. Owners choose what they post publicly.

items.q: What happens after a difficult case?
items.a: Owners can still rate privately so you hear the story before it is on Google.
No. Email and text are enough to begin.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same feedback routing at pricing suited to independent clinics.
You can use one clinic link or expand when you need per-provider tracking.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Veterinary Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
